basicInfo.name: Nightmare Sarah
basicInfo.flavor: The Alluring Succubus Sarah has lived through the ages, eventually claiming the queen's throne. Her beauty grows with time, stirring jealousy among other succubi.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Demon's Charm
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Defense Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Damage Reduction [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

Skill 2.name: Demon's Kiss
Skill 2.desc:
3 Allies
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).

Passive.name: Demonic Pact
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Damage Resistance. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Removes 2 debuff(s) when HP falls to 30% or lower. [1 Time(s) per Battle]
 - Heals HP equal to 50% of the caster's Magic Attack when HP falls to 30% or lower. [1 Time(s) per Battle]

profile.story:
A succubus living in Purgatory. Succubi are high-ranking demonkin who lure adventurers in to drain them of their power and magic.
Sarah is the leader of her coven.
Her strength and beauty are the envy of the other succubi.
She's the one that led Kris to where Rahal was sealed.
She initially approached Kris to laugh at the former noble knight's final struggles, but now she genuinely looks up to him as a commander and potential partner.
She's jealous of Knox, Kris's right-hand man and closest confidante, but has put those differences aside to help Knox in times of need. She's gradually overcoming her greedy and selfish nature as a demonkin to work for the good of others, specifically for Kris and the monster army.
